title: ITI publishes Normative Instruction incorporating post-quantum algorithms into ICP-Brasil
summary: ITI announcement that Normative Instruction No. 35 (30 January 2026) adds post-quantum cryptography algorithms to ICP-Brasil services and to the advanced electronic signature on the GOV.BR platform.

title: Normative Instruction ITI No. 35/2026 - Standards and Cryptographic Algorithms of ICP-Brasil (PQC)
summary: Full text of ITI Normative Instruction 35/2026 (DOC-ICP-01.01) establishing post-quantum cryptographic algorithms, key sizes and signature suites applicable to Brazil's Public Key Infrastructure (ICP-Brasil).

title: ITI announces advances in the GOV.BR electronic signature solution (post-quantum adaptation)
summary: ITI note (8 July 2025) reporting that adaptation of the digital certificate infrastructure to post-quantum cryptography algorithms is already under way alongside improvements to the GOV.BR advanced signature solution.

title: Secretary's visit to ITI aims at implementing quantum-resistant algorithms in the public key system
summary: ITI announcement (23 January 2024) describing a partnership with the Secretariat of Technological Development and Innovation to evaluate post-quantum algorithms and their impact on electronic signatures in ICP-Brasil.

title: ABIN launches cryptography with post-quantum algorithms for the elections
summary: Brazilian Intelligence Agency (ABIN) announcement that its libharpia cryptographic library, composed of post-quantum algorithms and developed by the Cepesc centre, will be used to protect the electronic voting system.

title: ABIN presents Intelligence Challenges for 2026 (transition to post-quantum cryptography)
summary: ABIN note (3 December 2025) listing the transition to post-quantum cryptography as one of five key intelligence challenges for 2026, citing the harvest-now-decrypt-later threat to current public-key cryptography.

title: OSIC 15/2024 - Information and Cybersecurity Guidance on emerging technologies
summary: GSI Information and Cybersecurity Guidance (OSIC 15/2024) addressing emerging technologies; includes a section on quantum computing and post-quantum cryptography recommending that organisations plan PQC migration of critical systems in advance.

title: Panorama of the regulation of emerging technologies (GSI webinar)
summary: GSI webinar presentation surveying regulation of emerging technologies (AI, IoT, 5G/6G, cloud) including quantum computing and post-quantum cryptography and their information-security implications.

title: Quantum computing requires strategic preparation to protect digital systems
summary: Article by SERPRO, the Brazilian federal data-processing service, stating it already performs evaluations and tests with post-quantum cryptography algorithms and urging government bodies to plan PQC migration for long-lived sensitive data.

title: Anatel and IME advance dialogue on national quantum communication infrastructure (Rede Quandanga)
summary: Anatel (national telecommunications regulator) note on the Rede Quandanga project with the Military Institute of Engineering (IME), an experimental quantum-communication network covering quantum cryptography and post-quantum cryptography for critical infrastructure.

title: Central Bank of Brazil, Brazil Quantum and Microsoft explore post-quantum cryptography for the Pix system
summary: Study involving the Central Bank of Brazil with Brazil Quantum and Microsoft (and Fenasbac support) analysing the feasibility of post-quantum cryptography algorithms to strengthen the security of the Pix instant-payment system. Published on a vendor (Microsoft) site, not on an official BCB domain.
